notes: Solid foundations: helmet, CORS, rate limiting, path.basename sanitization, dual MIME+extension check, global error handler covering multer/sharp/body-parser, clean constant separation, module export for testability. Weaknesses: no authentication on any endpoint, no magic byte validation (relies on client-declared MIME; sharp implicitly rejects non-images but malformed payloads could cause hangs), redundant double-validation in fileFilter + validateUploadInput (defensible but not DRY), unbounded in-memory Map with no eviction or max entry limit (memory leak in production), no processing timeout for sharp operations, no per-IP upload count limit, no graceful shutdown handler. Pagination validation and ID lookup are well-handled.
